scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npx firebase emulators:start --only auth,firestore"
scripts.test: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:unit: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run test:unit --prefix frontend
scripts.test:e2e: npx firebase emulators:exec --only auth,firestore "npm run test:e2e --prefix frontend"
